transcript: Speaker A: Ente munte academic performance enganeane ma'am? [How is my son's academic performance ma'am?] Speaker A: Nan avane pathikkan parayunnt pakse avan kelkkunnilla. [I always tell him to study but he never listens to me.] Speaker B: He doesn't trouble you in class right? He listens to everything you say doesn't he? Speaker A: Thank you ma'am nan urappayittum avan iniyum nalla marks netumenn neakkam. [Thank you ma'am. In this exam, I will make sure that he scores even better marks.] Speaker A: Ellapravasyam nan PTM i peakumpeal blank ayi peakumayirunnu. Teacher English I samsarikkum. Enikku tiriccennum ceadickan pattunnillayirunnu. Pakse ippeal SpeakX untallea. SpeakX-ile Sara AI teacher ente jeevitham matti. Daily 10 minute practice cheytu, ippeal nan confidently teacher-odu English-il samsarikkunnu. Ningalum SpeakX AI innutanne download cheyyu. [Every time I went to PTM, I used to go blank. Teacher speaks in English, I couldn't ask anything back. But now SpeakX is there. SpeakX's Sara AI teacher changed my life. Practiced 10 minutes daily, now I confidently speak in English with the teacher. You too download SpeakX AI today.]
on_screen_text: Ente munte academic performance [How is my son's academic performance ma'am?] Nan avane pathikkan parayunnt pakse avan kelkkunnilla [I always tell him to study but he never listens to me] Avan ninnale disturb onnum ceyunnillalea ninnall parayunnateallam kelkkunuryallea [He doesn't trouble you in class right? he listens to everything you say doesn't he?] Thank you ma'am nan urappayittum avan iniyum nalla marks netumenn neakkam [Thank you ma'am In this exam I will make sure that he scores even better marks] Ellapravasyam nan PTM i peakumpeal blank ayi peakumayirunnu. Teacher English I samsarikkum. Enikku tiriccennum ceadickan pattunnillayirunnu. Pakse ippeal SpeakX untallea. summary: A mother shares her past anxiety of going blank during parent-teacher meetings because she couldn't speak English. She explains how practicing for 10 minutes daily with SpeakX's AI teacher built her confidence. She urges viewers to download the SpeakX app today.
